subcodes.first_line: The Scene of transcendent Glory hath appeared, and the Lord of Destiny proclaimeth therein: "There is none other God but He, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر المنظر الاکبر و مالک القدر ینطق فیه انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم قد وجدت
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prophecy and fulfillment
